instructions: Get the T-number from .todo/config before adding tasks. Assign a stable T-number to each task in TODO-next and keep that number unchanged when moving the task to TODO-done. Keep one task per bullet, use a Links section for related references, and store TODO metadata inside .todo. Write task descriptions as direct present-action statements and avoid retrospective phrasing such as 'now ...'.
suggestions: Keep TODO-next focused on important developer and end-user work.
Use shared config under data-config/frontend_shared.json and data-config/server.json for the date/alias rule source.
Write task bullets as stable present-action statements, not retrospectives.
Avoid task wording that begins with 'now', 'now also', 'now removed', 'now always', or similar changelog-style phrasing.
